[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001110010 5
1 1111111000 7
2 1101110011 7
3 1101110101 7
4 1101111111 9
5 1111111000 7
6 1101110011 7
7 1101110101 7
